arts.ttl: Ex-Fulham and Newcastle star Aleksandar Mitrovic taken to hospital with heart issue
arts.sum: Reports in Saudi Arabia claim that Al Hilal striker and former Premier League marksman Aleksandar Mitrovic was taken to hospital on Sunday with a rapid heartbeat

arts.ttl: Simon Jordan reveals shocking 'cartel' vote truth blocking Newcastle United
arts.sum: However, at a time when Manchester United owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe is vehemently opposed to the concept of anchoring, which would level the playing field a little by imposing a universal spending limit regardless of a club's commercial might, Jordan has cast doubt on the rules ever changing to suit disruptors like Newcastle. Simon Jordan has taken aim at the 'cartel' of clubs who are 'blocking' Newcastle United's progress.

arts.ttl: Danny Dyer gives 'son-in-law' Jarrod Bowen permission to join two clubs with brutal Arsenal dig
arts.sum: West Ham supporter Danny Dyer has a strong connection to the Irons with his soon-to-be son-in-law Jarrod Bowen captaining the side, and he does not want to see the star's exit

arts.ttl: Joelinton's Newcastle United Carabao Cup final ban fear explained as Eddie Howe makes admission
arts.sum: Newcastle have one Premier League game before the final, away to West Ham United on Monday. Only a red card would carry over to the Carabao Cup, so supporters will be crossing their fingers Joelinton is on his best of behaviour and avoids being given his marching orders against West Ham.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Mikel Arteta receives Alexander Isak warning
arts.sum: All four clubs are long-term admirers of Isak, although Arsenal and Liverpool are currently considered to be the two most likely teams to complete a deal for the 25-year-old this summer. However, Newcastle have no intention of selling the Sweden star and only an offer of more than €180m would even tempt Eddie Howe’s side into negotiations over a summer transfer.

arts.ttl: Newcastle Want to Sign 'Outstanding' England International Forward
arts.sum: According to reports, Newcastle United are keen on bolstering their attacking options this summer and have their eye on one striker in particular.

arts.ttl: Amanda Staveley 'heartbroken' but offers PIF assurance on Newcastle United stadium plans
arts.sum: St James' Park remains 'close' to Amanda Staveley's heart - but the former Newcastle United owner knows that the club will make the 'right decision' about their long-term stadium plans. I'm so excited about the club, the community and the Carabao Cup coming up so it's a very special day."

arts.ttl: Newcastle United star in race against time amid potential summer exit as training update given
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe is hopeful of having Jamaal Lascelles available'soon' after offering a fresh injury update on the sidelined star. Howe recently admitted Lascelles was 'probably looking towards the end of the season' for a return date and given the former Nottingham Forest star is currently out of contract in the summer there is uncertainty over whether the St James' Park faithful will see the long-serving defender in black and white again.

arts.ttl: West Ham lead Man United and Tottenham in the race to sign 24-year-old English star
arts.sum: Premier League clubs West Ham, Manchester United and Tottenham are all looking for a new midfielder in the summer transfer window. A player that is catching the eye of most Premier League clubs is Lille midfielder Angel Gomes who is set to become a free agent at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Arsenal scouting 17-G/A Newcastle & Aston Villa target with a “bright future”
arts.sum: Arsenal are interested in signing the highly rated South American forward Santiago Castro from Italian club Bologna at the end of the season. The 20-year-old has done quite well since joining the Italian club in January 2024, and he has picked up nine goals and eight assists in all competitions so far.
